x.value: the number of the 3 bonds selected that lose value
x.description: Random variable representing the count of bonds (out of 3 selected) that lose value; the answer evaluates whether this variable follows a binomial distribution.

total_bonds.description: Total number of bonds available for selection.

bonds_lose_value.description: Number of bonds (out of 10) that will lose value due to a change in their ratings.

bonds_selected.description: Number of bonds randomly selected for the investment portfolio (number of trials).
